--- Hobgoblin — Armored Escapist --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.

══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Hobgoblin — Armored Escapist --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).

REASONING: Finger of Death on Hobgoblin — Armored Escapist. 7d8+30 necrotic.

→ Hobgoblin — Armored Escapist: CON save [d20:4+3=7 vs DC 20] FAIL! 31 necrotic damage. HP: 28/59
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Hobgoblin — Armored Escapist --- HP: 28/59 | AC: 20

--- Lich --- HP: 135/135 | AC: 17 | Cond: [paralyzed]
